error_signature: Your current role does not have permission to perform this action.
title: Insufficient permissions error in NetSuite node
symptom: When attempting to perform actions in the NetSuite node, an error indicates insufficient permissions. The error message states 'Your current role does not have permission to perform this action.'
applies_when: Token-based authentication is set up correctly
not_this_if: Using the correct Internal ID for records
Error occurs with a different node or integration
root_cause: The error occurs because the user is attempting to access records using the Sales Order number instead of the required Internal ID. NetSuite requires specific identifiers for API requests, and using the wrong ID leads to permission errors.
fix_steps: Identify the correct Internal ID for the records you want to access.
Update the request in the NetSuite node to use the Internal ID instead of the Sales Order number.
Retry the action to retrieve the transaction records.
agent_instruction: Use the Internal ID for records in the NetSuite node requests.
